Untitled UI Pro Icons 4K Synth

loading…
No icons match your filter.
Hover an icon to see its filename. Filename prefix → source: (none) = Lucide, ph- = Phosphor, phb- = Phosphor bold synth, lu- = Lucide synth (duotone/duocolor), feather- = Feather, iconoir- = Iconoir solid, ms- = Material Symbols. Licenses per style in {style}/LICENSE_NOTE.md. Categories in INDEX.md. This gallery is self-contained — no external stylesheets or fetches. Open directly (file:// OK) or via static server.
